auth.loginDescription: Access your wallet and draw history.
auth.loginFailed: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
auth.registerFailed: Failed to register. Please try again.
auth.registerDescription: Start your virtual wallet and try the draw engine.
auth.legalSectionDescription: Review and accept every active document to finish registration.
auth.legalRequired: You must accept the current legal documents to continue.
auth.legalLoadFailed: Unable to load the current legal documents right now.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSubmitted: If the account exists, a reset message has been sent.
auth.passwordResetDescription: Set a new password for your account.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in with the new password.
auth.passwordResetFailed: Unable to reset the password. Please try again.
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Confirm your email so security and recovery messages reach you.
auth.verificationSuccess: Email verified. You can continue signing in.
auth.verificationFailed: Unable to verify the email. Please try again.
auth.registrationSuccess: Account created. Check your email to verify it.

legal.title: Accept updated legal documents
legal.description: A new document version is now effective. Accept the current set to continue using the app.
legal.required: Accept every current legal document to continue.
legal.loadFailed: Unable to load the current legal documents right now.
legal.acceptFailed: Unable to record your acceptance. Please try again.

app.title: User Dashboard
app.drawLocked: Verify your email before running the draw flow.
app.notificationsDescription: KYC reviews, withdrawal progress, and settled markets now land here in one shared activity feed.
app.verificationGateTitle: Verify your email to unlock the account
app.verificationGateDescription: This account can sign in, but high-risk actions stay blocked until email verification is complete.
app.verificationGateBody: Verify the inbox address on file to continue with draws and other protected actions. We can send a fresh verification link if needed.
app.verificationEmailSent: A new verification email has been sent if the account still needs one.
app.marketsLocked: Verify your email before placing a market position.
notes: All debits and credits are written to the ledger.
Draws run inside a single atomic transaction.
Inventory is locked before stock deduction.

community.title: Community Board
community.description: Post a thread, reply in public, and let the backend anti-spam guard decide whether the content stays live or moves into the admin moderation queue.
community.createDescription: New threads publish immediately unless spam signals or policy thresholds push them into review.
community.listDescription: Visible threads only. Auto-hidden submissions stay out of this list until an admin restores them.
community.detailDescription: Read the visible replies and add a follow-up without leaving the dashboard.
community.emptyDescription: Start the first conversation from the form above.
community.emptyDetailDescription: Choose a thread from the left column to load the visible replies.
community.titlePlaceholder: Report a feature issue, open a discussion, or ask a product question
community.bodyPlaceholder: Write the initial context here. External links and obvious spam signals may move the post into admin review.
community.replyPlaceholder: Add a useful follow-up or answer.
community.submissionQueued: Submitted and queued for admin review.
community.submissionHidden: Submitted and hidden pending admin review.
community.loadThreadFailed: Failed to load the selected thread.
community.captchaPrompt: Complete the challenge before submitting when captcha is enabled for your account tier.
community.captchaRequired: Complete the captcha challenge before submitting.
community.captchaInvalid: Captcha verification failed. Try the challenge again.
community.kycRequired: Complete tier 1 KYC before posting in community.
community.threadMissing: This thread is no longer visible.
community.rateLimited: Posting is temporarily rate limited. Wait a bit and try again.
community.replyLocked: Replies are disabled because this thread is locked.

draw.gachaDescription: Turn the existing prize engine into a slot-machine flow: three-reel presentation, instant settlement, pity progress, and a verifiable fairness commit underneath the animation layer.
draw.title: Slot Machine
draw.subtitle: Every spin rides on the committed prize engine. The visible reels are presentation only; the real settlement still comes from the live pool, fairness epoch, and wallet ledger.
draw.multiLocked: Multi-spin is locked because `draw_system.max_draw_per_request` is currently {max}. Raise that config to unlock multi-spin.
draw.catalogLoadFailed: Failed to load the slot machine.
draw.disabledBySystem: Draws are currently disabled by system config.
draw.awaitingResultBody: Spin once or run a batch to reveal the next committed result.
draw.presentationNote: The reel stop is presentation only. The payout comes from the backend draw result shown in the fairness panel.
draw.pityDescription: Long losing streaks can trigger an automatic probability boost without overriding fairness or forcing a specific outcome.
draw.pityDisabledDescription: Pity compensation is currently off for this pool.
draw.payoutTableSubtitle: Featured prizes from the live pool
draw.fairnessPanelSubtitle: Commit-reveal proof for the current slot epoch
draw.fairnessExplainer: Each spin posts into the same fairness epoch. The commit hash is public now, and the seed becomes revealable only after the epoch closes.
draw.poolSubtitle: {count} active cards are currently in the banner.
draw.poolEmpty: No active prizes are configured yet.
draw.noPrizes: No active prizes in this pool yet.
draw.resultSubtitle: {count} results revealed in the latest spin.
draw.resultEmpty: No spin yet. Start the reels to reveal the first result.

statusDescriptions.won: A featured reward was selected and the backend prize was credited to your wallet.
statusDescriptions.miss: No payout this time. The animation is only a presentation layer over the committed backend result.
statusDescriptions.out_of_stock: The selected prize tier is currently sold out, so the spin settles into a blocked finish.
statusDescriptions.budget_exhausted: This prize lane hit the configured budget guard, so the system refused the payout.
statusDescriptions.payout_limited: A payout control rule blocked the win even though the line approached a high-value tier.

markets.title: Prediction Markets
markets.description: Browse active markets, inspect the live pool split, and place positions with the same wallet-backed ledger and locking rules used across the rest of the product.
markets.portfolioDescription: Review your open exposure, resolved payouts, refunds, and grouped position history without opening each market one by one.
markets.portfolioExposureDescription: The current pari-mutuel release shows stake exposure, net-of-vig settled payouts, and refunds. It does not calculate live PnL while markets are still open.
markets.portfolioLoadFailed: Failed to load your prediction market history.
markets.portfolioEmptyDescription: Once you place a position, your grouped market history will show up here.
markets.portfolioEmptyFilteredDescription: No records match this status filter yet.
markets.emptyDescription: Come back after the next round opens or ask an operator to publish a market.
markets.poolDescription: Each outcome shows the current amount staked and how much of the shared pool it represents.
markets.betDescription: Choose one outcome, enter your stake, and lock funds against this market until settlement or cancellation. Winning payouts are distributed pari-mutuel after vig.
markets.marketLockedNotice: This market is not accepting new positions.
markets.positionPlaced: Position placed. Market and balance refreshed.
markets.positionSold: Position sold. Market and balance refreshed.
markets.positionsDescription: Open and settled positions tied to your current account for this market.
markets.noPositions: You have not placed a position on this market yet.
markets.validationStakeFormat: Enter a valid amount with up to 2 decimal places.
markets.validationStakePositive: Stake amount must be greater than 0.

hero.title: Transaction-safe prize draws with configurable probability and ledger accuracy.
hero.description: Model wallet-backed draws, dynamic prize pools, and operations visibility inside a full-stack system built for concurrency, audits, and clean service boundaries.

card1.title: Draw Engine Snapshot
card1.description: Balance lock → Weighted pick → Inventory lock → Ledger

card2.title: Operations Control Surface
card2.description: Adjust weights, monitor pool balance, audit draw stats.
card2.body: Live configuration with audit trails. Every change is reflected instantly in the draw engine.

stack.title: Built on a modern stack
stack.description: This portfolio system prioritizes type safety, transactional integrity, and fast iteration.

metrics.label: Domain modules wired
metrics.detail: Users, wallet, prizes, draw engine, analytics, system config.

metrics.label: Transactional coverage
metrics.detail: Draw operations execute inside atomic transactions.

metrics.label: Real payment risk
metrics.detail: Virtual balance only. Perfect for portfolio demos.

features.title: A full-stack reward platform, wired end to end
features.description: Borrowing structure from the landing template, these sections highlight the data consistency, concurrency controls, and operational tooling that make the system portfolio-grade.

rows.title: Wallet + Ledger Integrity
rows.description: Every draw uses atomic balance locks, immutable ledger entries, and clear audit trails for both debits and rewards.

bullets.label: Atomic updates
bullets.copy: Balance and inventory are locked per draw.

rows.title: Dynamic Prize Pool Control
rows.description: Configurable weights, threshold gating, and stock locks prevent overselling while keeping probability updates instant.

bullets.label: Atomic updates
bullets.copy: Balance and inventory are locked per draw.

rows.title: Analytics Surface
rows.description: Monitor draw volume, reward distribution, pool balance, and user spend ranking with real-time visibility.

bullets.label: Atomic updates
bullets.copy: Balance and inventory are locked per draw.

cta.title: Ready to stress-test the engine?
cta.description: Spin up the demo, configure prizes, and watch the ledger update in real time.
